column1: # mrzavec project lexicon fixture (V13 item 1) — the committed demo/test
# lexicon for `check-text --lexicon`. One TSV row per sanctioned word:
# Coinage rows are exactly what `coin-check --lexicon-row` emits; the
# `praktika` row PINS an official word for a source concept, so official
# synonyms of "practice" in the text raise consistency warnings.
